name: Cross-Session Memory
description: Propagates durable, owner-stated facts between one agent's isolated channel sessions in near real-time via a shared fact store. Observes each turn's incoming prompt, distills facts, and injects a ranked, budgeted, lower-authority reference slice into the owner's other direct-message sessions as cacheable system context.

enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Turn cross-session propagation on or off.

owners.label: Owner IDs
owners.help: Extra sender ids treated as the owner, merged with commands.ownerAllowFrom. Must be channel-scoped (slack:U123); a bare id is not honored, and a wildcard (*) shares nothing.
